_meta.description: ARKA OS — Project Ecosystem Registry (user-local, populated after install)
_meta.format: Ecosystems group related projects that share squads, stacks, and conventions.
_meta.note: This file ships empty. Users define their own ecosystems locally in ~/.arkaos/ecosystems.json (populated by /arka onboard). Client names and internal project data MUST NOT be committed to the public repository.
